telegram_auth_dynamic.qr_password_required: Telegram requested a 2FA password. Enter it below.

telegram_auth.title: Telegram authentication
telegram_auth.qr_btn_hint: Open the Telegram app on your phone and scan the QR code to sign in quickly without a password.
telegram_auth.qr_hint: Open Telegram → Settings → Devices → Link Desktop Device and scan the QR code.
telegram_auth.send_code_hint: We'll send a code to your Telegram client. We don't store message history.
telegram_auth.code_sent_hint: We've sent a code to your Telegram. Enter it below.
telegram_auth.password_required_hint: A Telegram password (2FA) is required to finish sign-in.

chat_requests.date_range_incomplete: Set both range dates — “From” and “To” — or switch to “Recent messages for…”.
chat_requests.date_range_order: “From” date cannot be later than “To” date.
chat_requests.date_range_too_long: The range is longer than your plan allows ({{n}} days). Shorten the “From–To” period.
chat_requests.media_filter_toggle_tooltip: Search only messages with media files of the selected types
chat_requests.refresh_btn_title: Refresh folders and chats from Telegram
chat_requests.group_mode_tooltip: Run a query against multiple chats at once
chat_requests.group_limit_reached: You can select up to {{n}} chats.
chat_requests.group_limit_folder_truncated: Group request limit: selected {{n}} of {{total}} chats.
chat_requests.group_select_at_least_one: Select at least one chat for group analysis.
chat_requests.depth_estimate_note: The exact charge depends on chat activity and is calculated after the request completes.

subscriptions.paused_no_tokens_hint_topup: Buy more tokens or upgrade to a higher plan to resume.
subscriptions.paused_no_tokens_hint_upgrade: Upgrade to a paid plan to resume your subscriptions.

subscription_form.type_help: Events — subscription reacts to announcements/alerts matching your query and sends the list of specific messages. Digest — AI prepares a summary/digest of the chat for the given period.
subscription_form.chat_placeholder: Select a chat/channel or paste a link
subscription_form.chat_placeholder_group: Pick chats from the tree below
subscription_form.group_mode_tooltip: Subscription that monitors several chats at once
subscription_form.private_chat_hint: Subscribing to private and personal chats is only available when signed in with your personal Telegram account.
subscription_form.ai_model_help: This AI model will be used for this subscription. Free accounts use OpenAI.
subscription_form.prompt_placeholder: Enter the query for the subscription: what information to collect and when to notify
subscription_form.prompt_help: You can use keywords or a more complex query — analysis is performed by an AI model picked automatically by the router.
subscription_form.media_filter_hint: Track only messages with the selected media types. The query text (if any) refines the filter semantically.

dashboard.disclaimer: ⚠️ Chat analysis is performed by a third-party AI model (OpenAI). Do not upload secret or confidential data.

subscription_dynamic.operation_failed: Could not complete the subscription operation.

subscription_actions.aria_label_other: Actions for subscription from another mode

subscription_groups.other_note: These subscriptions were created in the other mode and are not active here yet.

chat_errors.private_no_access: This chat is not available for reading under the service account. Connect your personal Telegram or choose a public chat.
chat_errors.public_not_found: Chat or channel not found. Check the link, username or chat id.
chat_errors.invite_invalid: The invite link is invalid or has expired.
chat_errors.join_request_sent: A join request has been sent for this chat. It will become available only after approval.
chat_errors.service_account_channel_limit: Service accounts have temporarily reached the Telegram limit for joining channels. Please try again later.
chat_errors.flood_wait: Telegram has temporarily limited access for the service account. Please try again later.
chat_errors.telegram_not_authorized: Connect your personal Telegram account first.
chat_errors.resolve_failed: Could not open the chat. Check the link, username or access.

plan_limits.free_trial_expired_note: Trial subscriptions have ended. Upgrade your plan to keep using subscriptions.
plan_limits.free_trial_limit_note: Trial subscriptions limit reached. Upgrade your plan to create new subscriptions.
plan_limits.active_limit_note: You have reached the active subscriptions limit for your plan. Pause one of the current subscriptions or upgrade your plan.

plan_errors.history_limit_exceeded: Your plan allows analyzing no more than {{days}} days of history.
plan_errors.active_subscriptions_limit: Active subscriptions limit for your plan has been reached.
plan_errors.frequency_too_high: Your plan does not allow this frequency. Minimum allowed: {{minutes}} minutes.
plan_errors.free_trial_already_used: Trial subscription access has already been used. Upgrade to a paid plan.
plan_errors.trial_delete_forbidden: Trial subscriptions cannot be deleted manually.
plan_errors.trial_expired: The trial subscription has expired. Upgrade to a paid plan.

subscription_form_dynamic.prompt_or_media_required: Enter the query text or enable the media filter.
subscription_form_dynamic.group_chats_required: Pick at least one chat for the group subscription.
subscription_form_dynamic.group_media_filter_unsupported: Group subscriptions don't support the media filter. Disable it.

dashboard_dynamic.enter_public_link: Enter a public username or link to a public Telegram chat/channel.

collect: Going through the dialog piece by piece…
Scanning the dialog top to bottom…
Cat is skimming through the conversation…
Extracting the needed pieces from history…
analyze: Waiting for the AI to compute results…
finish: Building the answer brick by brick…

bot_connect_modal.title: Connect bot
bot_connect_modal.text: To activate the subscriptions engine, please connect the bot to CoTel.

onboarding.invite_body: CoTel reads your Telegram chats, channels and groups and surfaces only what matters. Want a quick tour to get started?
onboarding.relaunch_help: A short and a detailed tour of CoTel's main features.
onboarding.s_tg_body: Connect your own Telegram (via QR or phone number) — or use the CoTel service account for public channels, without connecting your personal one.
onboarding.s_tg_note: We don't store your message history or passwords, and process data only on your request.
onboarding.s_chat_title: Paste a chat, channel or group
onboarding.s_chat_body: A t.me/… link, an @username, or pick from your chat list. This is the data source CoTel will read. The field has quick search-as-you-type.
onboarding.s_query_body: For example: “what was discussed this week”, “find Python jobs, remote”, “collect links to articles”. With the media filter on, you can leave the field empty.
onboarding.s_period_body: Choose the period — minutes, hours or days — and set the amount. The longer the period, the more messages CoTel reads (and the more tokens the request costs).
onboarding.s_depth_body: Light — for most tasks (fast and economical). Balanced and Deep — for complex analysis. CoTel picks which AI model to use itself. Click ⓘ to see the approximate cost of each level.
onboarding.s_group_body: Turn this on to ask one question across several chats and get a combined answer. The number of chats for a group request depends on your plan.
onboarding.s_media_body: Need only messages with video, photos, audio, documents or links? Turn on the media filter and choose the types. You can also add query text for finer tuning — for example, limit file size, duration or whether there's a caption.
onboarding.s_run_body: Click to get a structured answer. How many tokens were charged is shown under the result, with a breakdown.
onboarding.s_subs_body: Subscriptions check your chosen chats on a schedule and send a Telegram notification when something important appears. Great for tracking news, announcements, jobs, mentions, topical digests.
onboarding.s_tokens_body: They pay for requests and subscriptions. Here in your profile you can see your balance, current plan and when the monthly limit resets. The “Buy tokens” button lets you purchase an extra token pack within your plan.
onboarding.s_history_body: The “Request history” tab shows what you analyzed and when, and how many tokens it used. You can restart this tour anytime from profile settings.
onboarding.f_tgstatus_body: When your personal Telegram account is connected, a green indicator lights up here and your username is shown. You can end the session at any time with the “End session” button.
onboarding.f_recent_body: This shows the most recent chats you ran requests on, so you can quickly return to them.
onboarding.f_mychats_body: This shows the tree of your Telegram chats (when your personal account is connected), respecting the folders you created in Telegram. The ⟳ icon is for manually refreshing the chat and folder structure if something changed in Telegram.
onboarding.f_subs_modes_body: You can work both under your personal Telegram account and under a service account. A subscription is created and runs under the account you created it from, and is shown in the matching mode.
onboarding.f_subs_other_body: If you switch between Telegram modes (for example, personal account ↔ service account) and have subscriptions created in another mode, they appear here. The ⇄ icon moves a subscription to another mode — if you want it to run under a different account.
onboarding.f_sub_create_body: Click “+” to create a new subscription. Next we'll go through the form fields — the same fields are used when editing an existing subscription.
onboarding.f_sub_name_body: A clear name so you can recognize the subscription in the list.
onboarding.f_sub_type_body: “Events” — sends specific messages matching your query. “Summary” — prepares a digest of the chat for a period.
onboarding.f_sub_chat_body: Pick a chat from the list or paste a link. This is the source the subscription will monitor. The field has quick search-as-you-type.
onboarding.f_sub_group_body: Turn this on so one subscription monitors several chats at once. Availability depends on your plan and mode.
onboarding.f_sub_period_body: How often the subscription checks the chat — from every 10 minutes to once a day. The minimum frequency depends on your plan.
onboarding.f_sub_media_body: Monitor only messages with the chosen media types: video, photos, audio, documents, links.
onboarding.f_sub_prompt_body: Describe what to collect and when to notify you. Keywords or a more complex query both work.
onboarding.f_sub_actions_body: Create the subscription or cancel your changes. You can edit a subscription later — the fields are the same as here.
onboarding.f_panel_collapse_body: This icon collapses the work panel — handy for reading results. Click it again to expand.
onboarding.f_block_collapse_body: Any block can be collapsed by clicking its header with the icon. That way the panel takes less space.
onboarding.f_user_area_body: Here are your email, current plan and the sign-out button. On sign-out, if “Enhanced security” is on, your Telegram session is ended too.
onboarding.f_menu_profile_body: Profile opens all account info: personal data, settings, request history and limits. From here you can also change your plan and buy more tokens.
onboarding.f_menu_help_body: “Help” has all the instructions and documentation for the service.
onboarding.f_menu_feedback_body: We welcome your suggestions, bug reports and any feedback. You can pick a category and attach files.
onboarding.f_prof_limits_body: These are your capabilities on the current plan: number of active subscriptions, history analysis depth, minimum frequency, group analysis and token top-ups.
onboarding.f_prof_levels_body: Here you can read how the analysis level (depth) works and how CoTel picks the AI model for different queries.
onboarding.f_prof_history_body: A summary of all your requests: when, how many tokens, group or not. Subscription history is on the neighboring tab.
onboarding.f_prof_personal_body: The data you provided at registration. Phone and time zone can be changed: the phone is prefilled for Telegram authorization, and the time zone affects the time shown in subscription notifications.
onboarding.f_prof_lang_body: Russian and English are available. The interface switches immediately when you change it.
onboarding.f_prof_secure_body: When enabled, signing out of CoTel also ends your active Telegram session.
onboarding.f_prof_relaunch_body: You've completed the detailed tutorial. You can restart it (or the quick start) anytime here, in profile settings.
